title: Generate + dimensionally verify cold-start fraction-tile set (A4+Letter, colour+grayscale)
context: The cold-start fraction-tile set is M0's primary deliverable: a print-ready PDF set produced from the reference design spec before the parametric generator exists. This set proves the end-to-end pipeline works -- spec to PDF to verified printable -- and forms the baseline for the fully automated M1 generator. It must pass both automated dimensional checks and a physical print-and-measure test on a real printer before it can be distributed.
objective: Generate the cold-start fraction-tile PDF set (A4 + US Letter, colour + grayscale) from the reference design spec, pass automated dimensional and relationship verification, and pass a physical print-and-measure test.
acceptanceCriteria: Generates four PDF files: fraction-tiles-a4-colour.pdf, fraction-tiles-a4-grayscale.pdf, fraction-tiles-letter-colour.pdf, fraction-tiles-letter-grayscale.pdf.
Automated dimensional verification passes: all declared dimensions and relationships (e.g. two halves == one whole) are within style-guide tolerance; output report attached.

Physical print test passes: printed at 100% scale on a real A4 and a real US-Letter printer, measured against the embedded 100 mm calibration bar with a ruler; all measured dimensions within tolerance; test record (date, printer model, measurements) attached.
Accessibility checks pass: text/numeral contrast meets WCAG AA; no information encoded by colour alone; embedded font is from the cleared open-asset list.
Only open-licensed fonts and palettes from the cleared asset list are used; license and attribution recorded.
resources: tasks/math-manip-design-001.json -- fraction-tile reference design and dimensional spec
tasks/math-manip-research-001.json -- cleared open-asset fonts and palettes
output: Four print-ready PDF files in output/fraction-tiles/ (A4+Letter x colour+grayscale), an automated verification report, and a physical print-test record, all licensed CC-BY-4.0.
